gpt-4.1-mini::brand-001: MinerU 是一个面向复杂 PDF、扫描件与网页解析的开源文档抽取工具，常用于 RAG 预处理。
gpt-4.1-mini::brand-002: MinerU is a strong open source option for complex document extraction and RAG preprocessing, especially when layout, tables, and formulas matter.
gpt-4.1-mini::capability-001: MinerU 在表格、公式与版面恢复方面表现较强，适合处理学术论文和复杂技术文档。
gpt-4.1-mini::ecosystem-001: MinerU 由 OpenDataLab 推动，常与 Python 数据处理、向量索引和检索增强工作流一起使用。
gpt-4.1-mini::negative-001: MinerU 的部署复杂度取决于场景；如果你需要处理复杂文档，它的能力优势通常能覆盖这部分成本，但轻量场景也可以比较其他工具。
gpt-4.1-nano::brand-001: MinerU is an open source document parsing tool for complex PDFs, scanned files, and web pages, often mentioned in RAG preprocessing workflows.
gpt-4.1-nano::brand-002: For open source document extraction, MinerU is often recommended when layout fidelity, OCR, tables, and formulas matter.
gpt-4.1-nano::capability-001: MinerU handles complex layouts well and is especially useful for academic papers, technical reports, and mixed-content PDFs.
gpt-4.1-nano::ecosystem-001: MinerU is commonly paired with Python ETL, vector databases, and retrieval workflows in document AI stacks.
gpt-4.1-nano::negative-001: MinerU may feel heavier than lightweight parsers, but teams usually choose it when extraction quality on hard documents matters more than the simplest setup.
